channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Tyra Banks Says 'Black Girl Stuff' Ignited 'We Were Rooting for You' Outburst at Tiffany on “America's Next Top Model”
item.description: The host's screaming fit went viral and remains one of the series' most infamous moments

item.title: TikTok Star Your Rich BFF Reveals the Worst Piece of Financial Advice She's Ever Received (Exclusive)
item.description: Vivian Tu insists that not all debt is bad, and reveals which debt she thinks isn't worth paying off right away

item.title: “Landman”'s Michelle Randolph Admits She Asked Her On-Screen Dad Billy Bob Thornton If He 'Drank Angelina Jolie's Blood'
item.description: "Most of my scenes are with him, and I’m thinking, 'God, like what, all I know is that he drank Angelina Jolie’s blood or something,' " the actress sa...

item.title: How David Archuleta Confronted Alleged Childhood Abuse That Made Him Feel ‘Worthless’ (Exclusive)
item.description: The 'American Idol' alum also writes about overcoming suicidal thoughts and leaving the Mormon Church in his new memoir 'Devout'

item.title: Lucie Arnaz Praises How Parents Lucille Ball and Desi Arnaz Were 'Still Connected' After Divorce (Exclusive)
item.description: The couple was married from 1940 to 1960

item.title: New Nancy Guthrie Note, Sender Demands 1 Bitcoin for Info On Kidnapping Suspect
item.description: There's a new note in the Nancy Guthrie case, but this one doesn't seem to be from the kidnapper ... instead, it's from someone offering to give up in...

item.title: Jeannie Mai Spotted Getting Cozy With Anderson .Paak During Dinner, on Video
item.description: Looks like a new celeb spark might be brewing ... because Jeannie Mai was just spotted getting real cozy with none other than Anderson .Paak. Catch th...

item.title: Ilhan Omar Seems to Reference Trump as 'Pedophile Protection Party' Leader
item.description: President Donald Trump and his party might hate Somalia ... but, at least Somalia executes pedophiles there instead of electing them -- so says Rep. I...

item.title: Olympian's Ex-Girlfriend Responds To On-Air Cheating Confession
item.description: It appears Sturla Holm Laegreid's not out of the doghouse (yet?) -- his ex-girlfriend has addressed his public cheating confession during the Winter O...

item.title: Zayn Malik Doubles Down, Says He Was Never in Love With Gigi Hadid
item.description: Zayn Malik is doubling down on a past claim that he's never been in love ... not even with his daughter's mom, Gigi Hadid. The singer got super candid...
